panelDescription: Connect your Meta WhatsApp Business API. Credentials, webhook, and setup steps all live here.

toasts.accessTokenRequiredInitial: Access Token is required for initial setup
toasts.reenterTokenToSave: Please re-enter the Access Token to save changes
toasts.savedButNotRegistered: Saved, but Meta couldn't register the number: {{error}}
toasts.savedRegistrationSkipped: Credentials saved and verified. Inbound registration was skipped (no PIN) — see Registration status below.
toasts.connectedGeneric: WhatsApp connected. Events will start flowing within a minute.
toasts.connectionTestFailed: Connection test failed. Check network and try again.
toasts.registrationLive: Number is fully wired — Meta is delivering events.
toasts.registrationNotComplete: Number is not fully registered. See the checks below for which step failed.
toasts.verificationEndpointError: Could not reach the verification endpoint.
toasts.connectionReset: Connection reset. You can now re-enter the credentials.

resetConfirm: This will disconnect this WhatsApp connection so you can re-enter it. Continue?

status.credentialsValidDesc: Your access token authenticates with Meta. See Registration status below for whether webhooks are actually wired.
status.configurePrompt: Configure your Meta API credentials below to connect your WhatsApp Business account.

registration.registeredTitle: Registered — Meta will deliver events to wacrm
registration.notRegisteredTitle: Not registered — Meta will not deliver events
registration.lastAttemptSuffix: . Enter (or correct) the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to retry.
registration.savedBeforeTracking: This number was saved before registration tracking existed, or registration was skipped. Enter the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to subscribe it.

connections.title: Connected numbers
connections.description: Select a number to edit, or add another. The header switcher changes which number the app is viewing.

credentials.title: API Credentials
credentials.description: Enter your Meta WhatsApp Business API credentials.
credentials.tokenHiddenHint: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
credentials.verifyTokenHint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
credentials.pinHintMetaPath: Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp Accounts → Phone Numbers → Two-step verification
credentials.pinHintPart4: , then paste it here so wacrm can subscribe the number — otherwise Meta routes inbound events to whichever app last claimed it (the symptom that hits second numbers under a shared WABA).
credentials.pinHintPart5: have no PIN and are pre-registered — leave this blank for them. Leaving it blank also keeps an existing registration untouched.

webhook.title: Webhook Configuration
webhook.description: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.

setup.title: Setup Instructions
setup.description: Follow these steps to connect your WhatsApp Business API.
setup.step1Item4: Fill in app details and create
setup.step2Item1: In your app dashboard, click "Add Product"
setup.step2Item3: Follow the setup wizard to link your business
